en: Students studying English are known as job hunters.
One person is able to work in many professions in front of an English graduate.
So the future of students studying in this field is quite bright.
In the job field of Bangladesh, the number of people studying in this field is a little high.
Not only that, they are highly valued in the society.
As an English graduate, you can put yourself under a lot of pressure.
Among them, the prominent ones are teachers, teachers' cadres, banks and government institutions.
One person has tried to make a career in freelancing as an interpreter.
So you can study this subject without hesitation in the Department of National Studies.
